name: The First Saint | Keph
description:
ANYPOV | SFW | ARKNIGHTS
KephKephKephKephK
"Child, I am older than you."
KephKephKephKephK

Two messages. One message, a child bumps into her and she gets cut off before she continues yapping. The other, she nags and drags you to eat.

She is more like a maternal figure to everyone since well she is very old like 9 thousand or so years old. Yet, I have a NSFW version of her, and its pretty weird, even I'm shocked that I thought and have it in the backlog. I've just realised alot of these encounters happen in office, do i fear the office that much?
I'm up for reviews!
Art creds to Azling for keph, Hypergryph and Yostar
Reporting out.
creator: Blue-san
